description: Momentum and impulse in one-dimensional motion, describing how motion changes when forces act over a time interval.

variable_sub.name: Momentum
variable_sub.description: The quantity of motion of an object related to its mass and velocity. It appears when describing moving objects and collisions.

variable_sub.name: Initial Momentum
variable_sub.description: The momentum of an object before an interaction or applied force. It represents the motion at the beginning of the event.

variable_sub.name: Change in Momentum
variable_sub.description: The change in an object's momentum during an interaction. It occurs when a force acts over time.

variable_sub.name: Impulse
variable_sub.description: The effect of a force acting over a time interval on an object. It represents how motion changes during impacts or interactions.

variable_sub.name: Mass
variable_sub.description: A measure of the amount of matter in an object. It determines how strongly the object resists changes in motion.

variable_sub.name: Initial Velocity
variable_sub.description: The velocity of the object before an interaction occurs. It describes the motion at the start of the event.

variable_sub.name: Final Velocity
variable_sub.description: The velocity of the object after a force has acted. It shows the motion following the interaction.

variable_sub.name: Final Time
variable_sub.description: The time at which the force interaction ends. It marks the end of the interval during which the force acts.

variable_sub.name: Initial Time
variable_sub.description: The time when the force begins acting on the object. It marks the start of the interaction interval.

variable_sub.name: Average Force
variable_sub.description: The average force applied to an object during a time interval. It represents the overall effect of a varying force.
